# Messages Overview

<!-- AUTOGEN:BEGIN (overview list generated by generate_docs.py) -->

This section contains documentation for all 32 ROS2 message definitions in the `morai_msgs` package.

## Message Categories

### Control Messages
Messages for controlling vehicle motion and behavior:

- **[CtrlCmd](CtrlCmd.md)** - Control command signals for steering, moving, and stopping the ego vehicle.

### Vehicle Status
Messages containing real-time vehicle state information:

- **[EgoVehicleStatus](EgoVehicleStatus.md)** - Status telemetry of the ego vehicle for closed-loop control.
- **[VehicleSpec](VehicleSpec.md)** - Query the specification of a vehicle by unique id.
- **[VehicleSpecIndex](VehicleSpecIndex.md)** - Vehicle specification query request.
- **[Lamps](Lamps.md)** - Vehicle turn signal and emergency lamp control.

### Collision & Safety
Messages related to collision detection and safety:

- **[CollisionData](CollisionData.md)** - Most recent collision between the ego vehicle and placed objects.
- **[VehicleCollision](VehicleCollision.md)** - A single collision event between NPC vehicles.
- **[VehicleCollisionData](VehicleCollisionData.md)** - Collisions between NPC vehicles (distinct from ego vehicle collisions).

### Traffic & Infrastructure
Messages for traffic lights and infrastructure control:

- **[GetTrafficLightStatus](GetTrafficLightStatus.md)** - Status of the closest traffic light to the ego vehicle.
- **[SetTrafficLight](SetTrafficLight.md)** - Control command to change a specific traffic light state.
- **[TrafficLightIndex](TrafficLightIndex.md)** - Traffic light query request for the TrafficLightInfo service.
- **[TrafficLightInfo](TrafficLightInfo.md)** - Query the state of a specific traffic light by index.
- **[IntersectionControl](IntersectionControl.md)** - Control command for an intersection.
- **[IntersectionStatus](IntersectionStatus.md)** - Current state of an intersection.

### Perception & Sensors
Messages for sensor data and object detection:

- **[ObjectStatus](ObjectStatus.md)** - State information for a single object in the simulation.
- **[ObjectStatusList](ObjectStatusList.md)** - Details of the closest objects around the ego vehicle (NPCs, pedestrians, obstacles).
- **[RadarDetection](RadarDetection.md)** - This message relates only to FMCW radar. All variables below are relative to the radar's frame of reference. This message is not meant to be used alone but as part of a stamped or array message.
- **[RadarDetections](RadarDetections.md)** - Array of radar detection points.
- **[GPSMessage](GPSMessage.md)** - GPS position data with local coordinate offsets.
- **[SensorPosControl](SensorPosControl.md)** - Control sensor positions and orientations.

### Simulation Control
Messages for simulator configuration and management:

- **[MoraiSimProcHandle](MoraiSimProcHandle.md)** - Playback commands and conditions for rosbag replay.
- **[MoraiSimProcStatus](MoraiSimProcStatus.md)** - Current status of the simulator replay system.
- **[MoraiSrvResponse](MoraiSrvResponse.md)** - Generic service response indicating success or failure.
- **[ScenarioLoad](ScenarioLoad.md)** - Load a scenario file into the simulator.
- **[EventInfo](EventInfo.md)** - One-time event control for vehicle state changes (used by the EventCmd service).
- **[ReplayInfo](ReplayInfo.md)** - Replay data containing ego vehicle state and surrounding object information.
- **[SaveSensorData](SaveSensorData.md)** - Configuration for saving sensor data to file.

### Ghost & NPC
Messages for non-player character control:

- **[GhostCmd](GhostCmd.md)** - Re-simulation (ghost) control of the ego vehicle using recorded data.
- **[NpcGhostCmd](NpcGhostCmd.md)** - Control commands for NPC/traffic vehicles in ghost mode.
- **[NpcGhostInfo](NpcGhostInfo.md)** - Information for a single NPC vehicle in ghost mode.

### Map
Messages for map specifications:

- **[MapSpec](MapSpec.md)** - Query the map coordinate system specification.

### Multi-Vehicle
Messages for multi-vehicle scenarios:

- **[MultiEgoSetting](MultiEgoSetting.md)** - Control multiple ego vehicles in the scene with external controllers.

<!-- AUTOGEN:END -->

## Usage

To use any message in your ROS2 node:

```python
from morai_msgs.msg import CtrlCmd

# Create a message instance
msg = CtrlCmd()
msg.accel = 0.5
msg.brake = 0.0
msg.steering = 0.1
```

Or in C++:

```cpp
#include <morai_msgs/msg/ctrl_cmd.hpp>

auto msg = morai_msgs::msg::CtrlCmd();
msg.accel = 0.5;
msg.brake = 0.0;
msg.steering = 0.1;
```
